summary: Tested database restore functionality (merge/replace modes), temp file cleanup task, and frontend Settings page UI. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/database/restore (merge mode) correctly inserts new records and skips duplicates
VERIFIED: POST /api/database/restore-replace (replace mode) replaces collection data, protected collections (users, system_settings, whatsapp_config, smtp_settings) are merged not replaced
VERIFIED: Restore endpoints reject non-JSON files with 400 status
VERIFIED: Restore endpoints require admin authentication (401/403 without auth)
VERIFIED: Temp file cleanup task registered in server.py startup and runs every 6 hours
VERIFIED: cleanup_temp_files function in background_tasks.py cleans temp_ledger_pdfs and temp_backup_files older than 2 days
VERIFIED: Backend logs show 'Temp file cleanup task started (runs every 6 hours)'
VERIFIED: GET /api/database/backup-history includes restore entries with type='restore' or 'full_restore'
VERIFIED: Frontend Settings page at /admin/smtp-settings has Database Management card with all required UI elements
seed_data_creation: Test items with prefix TEST_RESTORE_ created during restore tests (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database restore functionality fully tested. Merge mode inserts new records and skips duplicates. Replace mode replaces collections but merges protected ones (users, system_settings, whatsapp_config, smtp_settings). Settings page is at /admin/smtp-settings (not /admin/settings). Temp file cleanup runs every 6 hours and cleans files older than 2 days from temp_ledger_pdfs and temp_backup_files collections.

features_tested.POST /api/database/restore (merge mode): PASS - Inserts new records, skips duplicates
features_tested.POST /api/database/restore-replace (repl: PASS - Replaces collections, merges protected ones
features_tested.POST /api/database/restore (invalid JSON: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid JSON content
features_tested.Temp file cleanup task: PASS - Registered in server.py, function exists in background_tasks.py
features_tested.Frontend restore file input: PASS - Found with data-testid='restore-file-input' and accept='.json'

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - All APIs are real
